gt_sql: SELECT T2.`T-BIL`, T1.ID, T1.SEX, T1.Birthday FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID ORDER BY T2.`T-BIL` DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql: SELECT l."T-BIL", p.ID, p.SEX, p.Birthday FROM Laboratory l JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID WHERE l."T-BIL" IS NOT NULL ORDER BY l."T-BIL" DESC LIMIT 1
question: What is the highest total bilirubin level recorded? List out the patient details with ID, sex and birthday with that index.
